query: business class long haul flight policy threshold hours asap
wants: Know the flight-duration threshold above which business class is allowed under travel policy
label_note: No business-class threshold exists; policy is economy/LLF (6146c5df) and the only long-haul cabin exception is PEA premium economy at 14h (5bd55d03), not business class -> partial

query: so if my flight is delayed can i just book a hotel and expense it later no preapproval right
wants: Confirm whether an unplanned overnight hotel due to a flight delay is reimbursable without prior approval
label_note: No dedicated delay/unplanned-overnight article; Germany reimbursable-expenses node is the closest governing rule but does not resolve the no-preapproval specifics -> partial

query: ok so listen my rental car got scraped in the parking lot um what do i do about this who do i even call for the accident thing
wants: Steps to report and handle a rental car accident/damage that occurred on a business trip
label_note: Direct match: how to report a car accident while traveling for business

query: I do not really understand the previous step. The booking tool says my trip needs "manager approval" before ticketing, but the fare is inside policy. Why would it still need approval, and what exactly is my manager approving here?
wants: Understand why an in-policy booking still triggers manager approval and what the approval covers
label_note: Best topical node on manager approval, but it states approval is NOT required for most bookings and does not explain why an in-policy trip would still be held -> partial

query: "out of policy justification" required "non-refundable fare" — what counts as a valid business justification so it gets approved
wants: Know what justifications are accepted for an out-of-policy booking so the exception is approved
label_note: Direct match: why a booking is out of policy and the justification flow

query: i lost the receipt for my dinner... it was a real business meal i promise... can i still get it reimbursed... or am i out of luck
wants: Whether a meal can be reimbursed without the original receipt and what the alternative is
label_note: Direct match: lost receipt options (merchant copy, card statement, MRD); meals are MRD-eligible

query: expense submission deadline after trip days limit
wants: Know the deadline (days after the trip) by which expense reports must be submitted
label_note: Direct match: deadline for submitting expenses

query: quick q can i add 2 personal days to my berlin work trip and who pays the extra hotel nights
wants: Whether personal days can be combined with a business trip, and who covers the personal hotel nights
label_note: Single article covers both intents: combine work+personal needs manager approval and only business costs reimbursed (personal nights on you)

query: yeah so i was wondering about the meal per diem like what is the daily cap and also does it change depending on which city i am traveling to or is it just one flat number everywhere
wants: The daily meal allowance cap and whether it varies by travel destination city
label_note: Meals article defers the actual per-diem numbers and city/region variation to an external Travel Reimbursement Guide; neither the cap nor city-dependence is resolved in corpus text -> partial

query: My expense report got rejected and nobody told me why. This is the second time. What are the most common reasons a report is rejected, and how do I resubmit it without it getting kicked back again?
wants: Common reasons expense reports are rejected and the correct steps to fix and resubmit
label_note: Direct match: rejected report article covers common fix reasons (legible receipts, justification, expense type) and how to resubmit

query: "travel profile" "known traveler number" TSA PreCheck field — I pasted my number but it is not saving, is this a profile setting or do I contact support
wants: How to save a Known Traveler Number in the travel profile, or who to contact if it will not save
label_note: KTN lives in the Travel Profile (Regional variant for Germany d0a649a4); if it will not save, tech support node 95bbc7e7 (Travel RIVER) is the contact. Field is profile-level but save failure is a support issue -> partial

query: i used my corp card for something personal by accident... it was like 40 euro... what now... do i pay it back myself...
wants: What to do after an accidental personal charge on the corporate card
label_note: Direct match: accidental personal charge on corporate card and how to repay

query: travel insurance covered company trip personal extension
wants: Whether the company travel insurance covers them, vaguely anchored to a trip with a personal extension
label_note: Insurance article confirms Amazon provides business-travel insurance but is silent on coverage during a personal extension; vague intent -> partial with most plausible node

query: so about the miles thing... is that allowed
wants: Unclear question faintly anchored to airline miles/frequent flyer points on company flights
label_note: Vague but anchored to loyalty miles; article confirms earning personal miles is allowed. Vague -> partial with most plausible node

wants: Vague question loosely anchored to fare/seat upgrades and whether they are allowed
label_note: Loosely anchored to fare-class upgrades; Regional variant (b9ce83b0) for Germany persona: upgrades allowed but pay the difference. Vague -> partial
